attrs.text: Our Work

Human-centered design, strategy and engineering in one seamless workflow.
Here’s how we help our clients define and reach their endgame.

attrs.title: Helping a fitness brand hit the finish line
Teaming up with Lufthansa Group to co-create a new premium travel experience
attrs.description: Together with the Passenger Experience design teams at Lufthansa, Swiss and Austrian Airlines, Star has supported multiple innovation projects to elevate the passenger journey across digital and physical touchpoints.

attrs.title: Helping ZEISS digitally transform the eye exam
attrs.description: Star co-created the award-winning telehealth platform VISU360 with ZEISS. The secure, compliant and scalable solution connects optometrists to remote patients, improves provider workflows and boosts revenue opportunities for retailers.
